title: ゆる募、ネコの捕まえ方

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out on a walk...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Gahhh! Wait, come back! C'mon, lemme pet your
gorgeous floof—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Aw maaan... It's gone. Ugh, I'm pooped from all
of that running.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you there. Yeah, the person I'm looking at
right now. I've got a question for you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Got any fail-safe plans on how I can manage
to pet that cat just now?
choice_data_list: Just wait in a sunny spot.
Chasing it at full speed is sure to work!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Nothing beats lazing about in the sun. So
you think I should just chill and wait for it, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Weeelp, guess I'll just... yawn... have a little... nap...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wake me up when the cat... comes... Zzzzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I wait for the cat in Seiun Sky's place
while she snoozes away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's admirable how she's using everything at her
disposal. Or so I think in an attempt to console
myself after being so easily manipulated...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wow, nice idea! Well, get crackin', then.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Don't play dumb with me. You're the one
who said chasing after the cat'll work for sure, so
put your money where your mouth is.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
As for me, I'm gonna wholeheartedly cheer you on
from the sidelines!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It's right there in the shade of that tree! You
can do it! Woo, go get 'em!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cat proves to be far more wily than I
expected, and it seriously gives me the
runaround.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm unable to capture it on my own, so I end up
asking <chrname> for help...
